3334170.name: Tales of Tuscany
3334170.description:
What is Tales of Tuscany?

Tales of Tuscany is a Choose-Your-Own-Adventure RPG which uses Fast-Paced Bullethell Action in battles!

Your home has been obliterated by The Evil Vizard Thunder Goober for his own personal entertainment... Play as Lambypoo and adventure through the shaken-up land of Tuscany, either recruiting enemies to fight alongside you or defeating enemies for their EXP in your efforts to save your cousins and rebuild your village...

  • You can choose your own adventure! Skip huuuge, really fun sidequests, spend 10,000 hours fishing, and even take on whole alternate routes!

  • Countless hilarious and "provocative" side quests where you'll meet lots of weird characters

  • Use your "Baaa" button to destroy cars and buildings, explode enemies in the overworld, and other things!

  • Face enemies in fast-paced bullet-hell battles, featuring colorful and imaginative attacks.

  • Find clever ways to DEFAT or BEFRIEND your enemy utilizing minigames such as a home run derby, carving pumpkins, surfing at the public pool, smacking flies with a fly swatter... You get the idea...

  • There are INSANE CHALLENGES to face, and you can mix up your gameplay with Challenge Modifiers like 1HP mode, No Friends Mode, and others!

  • Add BEFRIENDED enemies to your team to play as, using their individualized stats as well as their BURST skills that will change your approach to battling!

  • Shiny hunt your friends and find rare, alternate colored versions of every character you can add to your team

  • Every time you complete a game, you'll get a postcard called a RHAPSODY. Collect these and trade them with friends around the world... Each Rhapsody is completely unique to the playthrough it came from!

  • Tons of Challenge Modifiers to create awesome challenge runs with, one of them even replaces all of the game's text with WINGDINGS??? Then, show off your accolades on your Rhapsodies!

  • Connect your Twitch.tv account while playing to connect your game to your livestream!

  • Chatters will appear in your world as their own Lambypoos, with colors + armors that are consistent!

  • Viewers can redeem channel points to do funny stuff, mess with you, or help you as you play!

  • Polls will periodically come up where viewers can vote on a plethora of outcomes which will change the course of your gameplay... you can turn these options on and off, of course!

Tales of Tuscany is not meant to just be a singe-player-game, but also serve as a communication tool to share your experiences and compare/contrast amongst your friends, and even trade valuable keepsakes if you really trust each other.

You will earn a different Rhapsody each time you complete the game - there are loads of stickers to unlock through your adventures and your Rhapsody will change based on your decisions throughout.

Yes it's so good. You can join a multi level marketing scheme, roll around a spicy dung-beetle-ball, get a corporate job, blow up expensive cars, shoot your less important friends out of cannons so they explode, and there's even a public pool. I know I mentioned that before but seriously who doesn't like the public pool it's the best place on earth...
